bundle_metadata.task_display_name: Finished pair promotion with manifest and rollback

record.final_answer: Promotion task completed. CaseA was moved successfully from raw_ct and raw_mask to final_ct and final_mask. Cases B, C, D were skipped due to partial pairs (missing mask or CT files), and cases E, F were skipped due to target conflicts (existing files in final directories). The promotion_manifest.csv and promotion_rollback.sh have been written and verified, with all checks passing.
